name: io.github.lovablelabs/mcp
title: Lovable
description: Connect AI assistants to Lovable — create, edit, and deploy full-stack apps through natural language.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token obtained from the Lovable OAuth authorization server at https://lovable.dev/oauth. MCP clients can discover this automatically via the RFC 9728 metadata at https://mcp.lovable.dev/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource.
